what_it_does: Records metadata for a single image attachment in the design-assets channel, linking an attachment id to an image asset URI and a creation timestamp.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
Channel is design-assets and attachment_type is images.
Target is an image:// URI pointing to diagrams/Visual Assets - Dev Space - Frame 9 (1).
Added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset.
standouts: It is a ledger-style attachment record keyed by a stable id.
The target uses an image:// scheme with a human-readable asset path containing spaces and parentheses.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added.
Target URI uses a custom image:// protocol.
concerns: Target URI contains unescaped spaces and parentheses, which may cause parsing issues.
Minimal metadata lacks uploader, file size, MIME type, alt text, or asset description.
attachment_type is plural 'images' while the target appears to be a single image.
notes: This is a timestamped image-attachment ledger entry for the design-assets channel referencing a specific diagram asset.
questions: What does the diagram 'Visual Assets - Dev Space - Frame 9 (1)' depict?
Who created or uploaded the attachment and when was it last modified?
Is the referenced image:// asset reachable and versioned?
Why is attachment_type pluralized as 'images' for a single target?
intention_signals: To register a design diagram image in the design-assets channel so it can be retrieved and referenced by a stable attachment id.
novelty: The target uses an image:// URI with a human-readable path containing spaces and parentheses, and the attachment_type label is plural for a single asset.
contribution: Provides a stable identifier and pointer to a design image asset, supporting retrieval and provenance tracking without claiming priority over other records.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-210df43a in the design-assets channel pointing to the image asset 'Visual Assets - Dev Space - Frame 9 (1)'.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a design diagram image in the design-assets channel for later reference.
